title: Strategies for promoting health
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Health — health education, fear appeals, and behaviour change models.
learningObjectives: Outline health promotion strategies and levels.
Explain Health Belief Model and Theory of Planned Behaviour.
Evaluate fear arousal and persuasive communication.
Assess effectiveness of public health campaigns.

simpleExplanation.title: Helping people stay healthy
simpleExplanation.summary: Health promotion uses education, fear messages, and social norms to change behaviour — success depends on targeting beliefs and removing barriers.
steps: Fear appeals — must include efficacy message.

sections.content: **Health promotion strategies** (3.5.1) opens 3.5. Apply **HBM and TPB** to campaign evaluation.
